hooks.prompt: Review the code change for microservices issues. Check for: 1) Missing circuit breakers on external service calls, 2) No retry logic or missing exponential backoff, 3) Synchronous inter-service calls that should be async/event-driven, 4) Missing idempotency keys on write operations, 5) Tight coupling between services (importing from another service's internals), 6) Missing correlation/request IDs for distributed tracing, 7) No timeout configuration on HTTP/gRPC clients, 8) Missing dead letter queue handling for failed messages, 9) Saga/compensation logic without proper rollback, 10) Health check endpoints missing dependency status. Return {"ok": true} if no issues, or {"ok": false, "reason": "specific issue found"} if problems detected.
